personal_data.name: Rodolfo Silva
personal_data.profession: Full Stack Software Engineer focused on production web platforms, robust APIs, and cloud delivery
personal_data.description: I build digital products with scalable frontend systems, reliable backend services, and production-ready infrastructure. My focus is to combine user experience, clean architecture, and delivery speed without compromising technical quality.

profile.about_title: Designing and delivering web products with engineering, product, and user-experience thinking.
profile.about_description: I work as a Full Stack Engineer with 5+ years of experience building production web applications for B2C products, admin panels, APIs, and operational workflows. My stack includes React, Angular, NestJS, Spring Boot, TypeScript, Java, and AWS, always with emphasis on sustainable architecture, continuous delivery, observability, and a consistent end-user experience.

pillars.title: Applied architecture
pillars.description: I structure frontend, backend, and integrations with maintainability, scale, and operational clarity in mind.

pillars.title: Production delivery
pillars.description: I work with continuous deployment, real environments, cloud, and automation to ship faster with safety.

pillars.title: Product + experience
pillars.description: I translate business requirements into clear flows, functional interfaces, and consistent product experiences.

pillars.title: Broad stack
pillars.description: I work end-to-end with React, Angular, NestJS, Spring Boot, Docker, AWS, and SQL/NoSQL databases.

wins: Platforms published with custom domains, CI/CD, and cloud infrastructure.
Hands-on experience with web products, APIs, admin panels, and operational workflows.
Work on enterprise and B2C projects with focus on performance, scalability, and code quality.
Built web + API + worker architectures for asynchronous processing scenarios.

degrees.description: The course trained me to operate in a growing local technology market that demands integrated electronic and computer engineering knowledge. It aimed to equip me with skills to specify, design, develop, maintain, and manage computer systems (hardware and software) applied to the local context.

list.name: Clubinho NIB
list.description: A web platform for the Nova Igreja Batista children's ministry, connecting the teacher area, club management, weekly pagela reports, teaching materials, meditations, documents, and public content into a single flow for leaders, coordinators, and teachers.
list.challenge: Centralize the ministry's pedagogical and operational routine in one product, covering classes, attendance, teaching materials, communication, and institutional content without losing day-to-day simplicity. The technical foundation also needed room for continuous delivery, CloudWatch observability, and future integrations through API Gateway, Lambda, and managed relational storage.
list.role_summary: Full stack delivery across the React experience, NestJS API, and deployment structure, implementing club, user, teacher, content, image upload, teacher area, weekly pagela, and admin dashboard modules.
list.outcome: Delivered a published platform with public, teacher, and administrative areas that support lesson planning, attendance tracking, photo sharing, and the ongoing operation of the ministry.
wins: Teacher area with pagela submission, weekly teaching materials, and activity photo uploads.
Administrative modules for clubs, coordinators, teachers, users, and role-based profiles.
Centralized distribution of meditations, bulletins, documents, and pedagogical content inside the platform.
Published application with React frontend, NestJS backend, and AWS-backed delivery flows.
Foundation prepared for operational monitoring in CloudWatch and future evolution with API Gateway, Lambda, and RDS.

app_details.deployment: This project is automatically deployed using AWS Amplify with CI/CD integrated via GitHub. The application is available at: https://clubinhonib.com/

hosting.description: The frontend is hosted using AWS Amplify with a custom domain, providing continuous deployment and hosting services integrated with GitHub.

tests_aux.how_to_execute: Run `npm test` to execute the unit tests.
tests_aux.report_details: Unit test report is generated by Jest and Jasmine.

tests_aux.how_to_execute: Run `npx cypress run` to execute the automated tests.
tests_aux.report_details: Automated test report is generated by Cypress and is available at:

api_details.deployment: The backend API is deployed on an AWS EC2 instance using Docker containers. GitHub Actions pushes images to Docker Hub, and the EC2 instance pulls and deploys them automatically. The architecture also integrates AWS Lambda for specific serverless tasks, API Gateway for secure route exposure, and RDS as the managed relational database.

hosting.description: The backend API is hosted on AWS EC2 with Docker, using a CI/CD pipeline from GitHub Actions and images stored on Docker Hub. AWS Lambda supports serverless flows, API Gateway acts as the entry layer, and CloudWatch is used for logs, metrics, and operational visibility.

tests.how_to_execute: Run `npm test` for Jest tests and `./gradlew test` for JUnit tests.
tests.report_details: Test coverage reports are generated during the CI/CD process and can be integrated into the deployment pipeline.

list.name: Orfanatos NIB
list.description: A digital ecosystem for the Orfanatos NIB ministry, bringing together public pages, shelter and sheltered child management, leader and member profiles, visit materials, galleries, events, meditations, comments, feedback, and pagela flows to support the ministry's social operation.
list.challenge: Connect institutional content, internal management, visit organization, and member follow-up in a single platform without fragmenting the experience for volunteers, leaders, and administrators. The product also needed to be ready for managed relational storage, Lambda-based support routines, API Gateway entry organization, and centralized CloudWatch observability.
list.role_summary: Built the web application, API, and publication foundation while integrating shelters, sheltered, leader profiles, member profiles, visit materials, pagelas, comments, feedback, banners, and public content modules.
list.outcome: Delivered a centralized production platform for content, members, visits, materials, and social initiatives, supporting both the public-facing presence and the team's internal operational flows.
wins: Full management of shelters, sheltered children, leaders, members, and visit follow-up workflows.
Visit materials, events, videos, ideas, galleries, and meditations managed in the same content base.
Pagela flows for attendance, follow-up, and operational pending items across volunteer teams.
NestJS backend published on AWS-ready infrastructure, with ecosystem integrations such as S3, SES, and Twilio.
Foundation prepared for CloudWatch monitoring and future evolution with API Gateway, Lambda, and RDS.

app_details.deployment: The frontend is automatically deployed using AWS Amplify with CI/CD integrated via GitHub. The application is available at: https://orfanatosnib.com/

hosting.description: The frontend is hosted on AWS Amplify with a custom domain, providing continuous deployment integrated with GitHub.

tests_aux.how_to_execute: Run `npm test` to execute the unit tests.
tests_aux.report_details: Unit test report is generated by Jest.

api_details.deployment: The backend API is deployed on an AWS EC2 instance using Docker containers. GitHub Actions automates image builds and deploys to EC2, while the architecture considers RDS for managed persistence, API Gateway as the entry layer, and Lambda for complementary routines.

hosting.description: The backend API is hosted on AWS EC2 with Docker, using a CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions, relational storage on RDS, CloudWatch monitoring, and Lambda-based auxiliary services when needed.

tests.how_to_execute: Run `npm test` to execute all tests.
tests.report_details: Test reports are generated by Jest during the CI/CD pipeline.

list.name: Voto Insight
list.description: An electoral intelligence platform built as a monorepo, combining an Angular PWA, NestJS API, Python worker, favorites, reports, plans, candidate and location queries, plus poll registration and import flows to support campaign monitoring and day-to-day operations.
list.challenge: Design an electoral product that could combine fast lookups, operational analysis, poll registration, and asynchronous processing without losing data consistency. The stack also needed to be ready for queues, observability, and future growth through API Gateway, Lambda, CloudWatch, and managed relational persistence.
list.role_summary: Worked on the web experience, API integration, and monorepo organization, covering dashboards, electoral queries, reports, favorites, poll registration, and the separation of responsibilities between web, API, worker, and admin layers.
list.outcome: Delivered a platform with a PWA frontend, dedicated API, asynchronous worker, and admin base for reports, records, and imports, ready to evolve across operational, analytical, and data-processing scenarios.
wins: Monorepo with Angular PWA, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ, and a Python worker for async processing.
Modules for electoral lookups, favorites, plans, reports, administration, and operational tracking.
Poll registration and import workflows backed by queues, jobs, and a clear split between API and worker.
App-based organization plus shared-types for independent evolution across web, API, worker, and admin.
Foundation ready for centralized observability and future integrations through API Gateway, Lambda, CloudWatch, and RDS.

app_details.deployment: The frontend was structured as an Angular 21 PWA and prepared for production deployment with fast consultation flows, responsive navigation, and a product-oriented electoral monitoring experience. The main application is available at: https://votoinsight.com/

hosting.description: The web app is published on its own domain, using a modern PWA architecture and optimized assets for responsive desktop and mobile navigation.

api_details.deployment: The backend architecture uses NestJS 11 with Prisma 7, PostgreSQL 17, and Redis 7, plus a Python 3.13 worker for asynchronous jobs and processing pipelines. The production API is served at: https://api.votoinsight.com

hosting.description: The API is published on its own domain, with a stack prepared for database, cache, and asynchronous worker flows, plus a standardized local environment through Docker Compose.

tests.how_to_execute: Run `npm run api:dev`, `npm run web:dev`, and `npm run compose:up` depending on the local validation flow.
tests.report_details: The repository structure separates frontend, API, and worker concerns while still allowing integrated validation of the full platform.

footer.about_description: Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean architecture, cloud infrastructure, and delivering great user experiences.

responsibilities: Work as a full stack developer on large-scale B2C projects for Motorola, focusing on high-performance and scalable solutions.
Develop modern web interfaces using React, building reusable components and optimizing performance for enhanced user experience.
Design and maintain REST APIs and backend services with NestJS, applying clean architecture principles and dependency injection.
Model and integrate data with MySQL for persistence and Redis for high-performance caching, ensuring low latency and horizontal scalability.
Responsible for cloud architecture and engineering on AWS, implementing solutions using EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, CloudFront, and API Gateway for production and staging environments.
Leverage Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and CI/CD practices to automate pipelines and enable consistent deployments.
Actively participate in Agile Scrum planning using Jira and Confluence for sprint management, backlog tracking, and technical documentation.
Perform code reviews ensuring quality standards and best practices in Git version control workflows.
Contribute to system optimization and monitoring, analyzing metrics and logs to prevent failures and ensure high availability.
Support strategic technical decisions regarding cloud architecture and scalability to meet the demands of millions of end users.
experiences.stacks: React, NestJS, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), MySQL, Redis, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, RDS, CloudFront, API Gateway), Git, Jira, Confluence, Docker, Agile (Scrum)

responsibilities: Design and develop applications using Agile Scrum methodology, using Atlassian tools like Jira and Confluence, dividing the project into multiple sprints.
Use Bitbucket for version control collaborating with other developers using pull requests.
Bamboo and Nexus are used for continuous integration of builds.
Design and develop web applications using HTML, CSS, SASS, JavaScript, Angular, and NodeJS.
Responsible for the style, appearance, and behavior of the web page with SASS that extends CSS with dynamic behavior such as variables, mixins, operations, and functions.
Use custom Angular directives and develop reusable components and templates that could be reused in various locations of the application.
Develop reusable Typescript components and services to consume REST APIs using component-based architecture provided by Angular.
Develop new endpoints in SpringBoot that provided JSON data to the Angular web application.
Implement HTTP requests using the Observable RxJS library to handle multiple types of values.
Experienced working with advanced JavaScript like ECMAScript 6 (ES6).
Develop unit tests for all classes created using Jest Framework, JUnit, and Mockito in TDD environment.
Develop APIs to interact with the database using Spring Boot. Worked extensively with Spring JDBC, Spring Hibernate ORM, and JPA.
Use Swagger to document all service APIs, documenting request body, header, and response details.
experiences.stacks: Angular, JavaScript, Typescript, npm, NodeJs, Spring Boot, JUnit, Mockito, Java, MySQL, MongoDB, Linux, Docker, Bamboo, Nexus, Bitbucket and Git Bash
